item.title: Daily Briefing - 2026-07-12
item.description:
**Morning Briefing**
**What Changed Since Yesterday** Markets remain stable. Major indices recorded slight gains. Oil prices have seen a modest uptick. Inflation reports continue to be a concern but show signs of stabilization.
**Venezuela Update** Venezuela's government has announced new negotiations with opposition leaders. Discussions focus on humanitarian aid and potential electoral reforms. International observers are expected to monitor the talks closely.
**UK Response Signals** The UK government has reiterated its commitment to support Ukraine. New military aid packages are being considered. The Chancellor will make a statement on economic measures later today.
**Legal/Docket Watch** No significant updates related to Epstein today. Ongoing cases remain in a holding pattern as procedural matters are addressed in court.
**What to Watch Today** Look for the Chancellor's statement and its implications. Monitor developments from the Venezuela negotiations. Keep an eye on market reactions to inflation data. Watch for any updates from the Federal Reserve regarding interest rates.
End of briefing.
